title: thrasya schumannii
intro: Thrasya schumannii, also known as False Flax, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Linaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Thrasya schumannii include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make capsules or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
